bandar.title: 🐒 Bandar, the Greedy Monkey
bandar.html:
Bandar was a little monkey who lived in the jungle. He was very greedy — he always wanted more and more food!

One day, Bandar found a jar full of nuts. He put his hand inside and grabbed as many nuts as he could. But his hand was too full! He couldn't pull it out of the jar.

'Let go of some nuts!' said the baker who owned the jar. But Bandar didn't want to let go. He wanted all the nuts!

Bandar sat there all day. He was bored and hungry because he couldn't eat the nuts in the jar. He couldn't hide or play either.

Finally, Bandar let go of the nuts. He took just a few and was happy. He didn't steal anymore. He learned that being greedy doesn't make you happy!

bodyactions.title: 🏃 Our Body in Action
bodyactions.html:
Our body has many parts and we use them every day!

We use our face to show feelings. We smile when we are happy and frown when we are sad. Our nose helps us smell things.

We use our hands to hold things, write and draw. We use our arms to carry things and hug our friends.

Our feet help us walk, run and jump. We use our knees to bend our legs. A cook uses their hands to make food. A baker uses their hands to make bread.

Yesterday, I ran in the park. My friend fell down and hurt his knee. The teacher came and helped him. She said: 'Don't worry! It will be fine.'
